# rpx2json (RPX2ACR)

RPX (ActiveReports) files to ACR (JSON) converter.
**Windows only**

---

## Japanese

日本語版はこちら → README.ja.md

---

## Overview

This tool converts RPX files (ActiveReports report definitions) into ACR (Across Report) JSON format.

This repository provides a public version of the RPX to JSON conversion tool.

---

## Target Users

* Developers using ActiveReports
* Users migrating to ACR (Across Report)

---

## Requirements

* Windows 10 / 11
* RPX files generated by ActiveReports

---

## Download

Download the executable from Releases:
https://github.com/acrossreport/rpx2json/releases

---

## Usage

Run from Command Prompt:

```bash
rpx2acr.exe sample.rpx
```

---

## Output

Outputs JSON to standard output.

---

## Notes

* Some layout and features may not be fully converted
* Full conversion capabilities are managed separately

---

## Supported

* Basic layout structure
* Section information
* Control data

---

## Not Supported

* Full WYSIWYG reproduction
* Scripts
* Advanced formatting

---

## License

The internal implementation (`rpx2json-internal`) is not public.

---

## Related

* ACR (Across Report)
* ActiveReports
